title: Frame Object Schema
description: Schema for Frame objects representing atomic units of strategy and research focus

frame_name.description: Human-readable name for this strategic frame

frame_description.description: Clear description of what this frame represents and how it shapes analysis

strategic_context.description: The business context or strategic objective this frame addresses

analysis_questions.description: Key questions this frame asks of the evidence

frame_type.description: Type of frame (user_experience, business_impact, technical_feasibility, etc.)

stakeholder_audience.description: Target audience for insights generated through this frame

success_criteria.description: Criteria for determining if this frame has been successfully applied

gallery_id.description: ID of the Report Gallery collection this frame belongs to

related_frames.description: IDs of related frames that complement or contrast with this one

tags.description: System-derived tags from DUX scan (not manually added)
